reasoning: Focusing on Koren’s lactate clearance limiter is critical to improve the 5- to 20-minute power drop seen in your recent power curve. Since your last ride was low intensity, this workout will target and enhance your fatigue resistance in preparation for the Alpine Loop’s main climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 x 12 min of over-unders (6 min at 209-223W, followed by 6 min at 242-256W), 3 min easy spin between sets

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
